recommended_actions.title: Improve brand visibility in AI answers
recommended_actions.why_it_matters: If the brand is not being surfaced in answer engines, competitors are more likely to be recommended first.
recommended_actions.recommended_fix: Prioritize direct-answer pages, comparison pages, and FAQ-led content for missed commercial and recommendation-style queries.
recommended_actions.support_signal: Low visibility score across the latest audit.

recommended_actions.title: Clarify brand and entity signals
recommended_actions.why_it_matters: If your site does not clearly explain who you are, what you offer, and how you differ, answer engines may prefer more explicit competitors.
recommended_actions.recommended_fix: Strengthen homepage, about page, and core service pages with clearer positioning, repeated brand signals, proof, and differentiators.
recommended_actions.support_signal: Low entity score in latest audit.

recommended_actions.why_it_matters: Repeated competitor presence suggests stronger topic ownership or clearer entity positioning.
